title: Data Pipeline Architecture
details: Successfully implemented a scalable data pipeline using Apache Kafka and Spark. Reduced data latency by 45%. Reviewer noted excellent documentation and clean code structure.

title: Frontend Component Library
details: Built a comprehensive React component library with Storybook integration. Ensured 100% WCAG accessibility compliance across all interactive elements.

title: Machine Learning Model Tuning
details: Optimized hyperparameters for a Random Forest classifier reducing false positives by 18%. Used cross-validation to ensure model robustness.
